summary: Iteration 38: Verified bug fixes for 1) Document Import Dialog 'Als Link' mode - WORKING, 2) User group_ids migration - WORKING, 3) Persistent document storage path /app/data/docs - WORKING. All requested features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: TipTap warning: Duplicate extension names found: ['link', 'underline'] - This is a minor warning but should be addressed to avoid potential issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified working: 1) 'Als Link' document import mode correctly inserts a link with document filename into the editor using editorRef.current.getEditor().chain().focus().insertContent(). 2) User group_ids migration adds empty array to all users on startup. 3) Documents are stored in /app/data/docs/ persistent path.
